<@&1219020123218645102>

author: Jdub
content:
Biggest Day Of The Year For Me!!

+12K Realized Intraday Plus Some Trailers Still
+17K Unrealized In Long Term 🙂

Beautiful trade today on TSLA. Hopefully some of you guys were able to capture it. I try my very best to outline the moves before hand in the pre market and in the live sessions. The reason I do them is for you guys to build conviction yourself. There is no better feeling then having your own conviction in a trade. That's why we always preach understanding whats going on instead of relying on "signals". You can follow signals all day but in the end you won't become profitable if don't learn to trade for yourself.

With that being said I just took some time to reflect today and I wanted to let you guys know that trading is hard. We might make it seem easier then it is at times but the reality is that trading is one of the most difficult professions in the world. 

I started trading in 2019. At the time I was living with my grandparents in an unfinished basement. I was in school, was working at Amazon while trying to make trading work. For the first two years I was losing every-single day and it felt like I couldn't even put on a winning trade. Nothing felt like it was going my way. I was struggling everyday but I knew that it was only a matter of time. 

I know some of you guys are in that position right now and I just want to let you guys know that it is going to get better. Everything that you need to succeed in the markets is all in front of you. All you have to do is put in the work. Show up to the pre markets preps, watch the live sessions over and over again, watch the trade reviews. We can layout the full blue print but in the end it is up to YOU to put in the work. I can't come and click the buttons for you. 

Just wanted to end it off here. I usually don't get too emotional or like typing out these motivational speeches but I thought if it can help someone or motivate someone then it would be worth it.  At the end of the day trading is very lonely and I think we've built a great community here and all want each other to win. 

Let's keep killing it team! @everyone

author: Jdub
content:
I've said it once before but I will say it again. 

These market have plenty of liquidity and volatility. What occurs in this case is moves happen quicker. 
The higher timeframes is not as clear and that's why you have so many intraday reversals. 

What happens in this case is you have to size down and have a wider stop if you want to risk the same amount as before.

Other things to note is don't marry a position. Things can move very quickly to either side. That's why I'm currently not putting on any swings since you can't hold onto a position for more than 2 hours. 

Also it makes it harder to manage positions with this volatility so I will refrain from calling out positions later into the day unless the trade is very clear. 

Make sure to actively monitor your positions if you have any. With that being said I will see you guys tm morning for CPI.

author: Jdub
content:
Breakeven week for me 

Full transparency very tough past two weeks in the markets ever since the trump tariffs news

Trades setups will look good but ultimately not work out just due to the context of the overall markets. 

The markets have been very difficult due to the lack of continuation so if you are feeling down its normal. 

During these periods its best to play defense and be a lot more selective. 

Don't try and force setups or try and switch strategies. The markets are now back at aths so I expect some nice price action with a bunch of earnings and new events coming up. 

The key is to not only protect your capital its also to protect your mental capital. 

I will be getting plenty of rest this weekend and hopefully I feel better by Monday! 

Hope you guys have a great weekend! @everyone

author: Jdub
content:
**🚨 BLACK FRIDAY SALE — Ending Soon 🚨**


The final sale of the year is coming to an end soon!

I just wanted to take a moment to reflect on what this past year has meant. When we launched the accelerator, I genuinely didn’t know what to expect. It was my first time live trading in front of so many people, every day, with full transparency.

I put a lot of pressure on myself not just to perform, but to show up consistently, execute well, and be someone you could learn from in real time.

After daily live sessions, premarket prep, weekly breakdowns and trade reviews, I can confidently say I’ve grown massively as a trader, not just in P&L, but in execution, discipline, and psychology.

And more importantly, many of you have grown along with me.

I personally had my biggest month ever making over $100K in profits. I'm super grateful to be able to say this. 

But what's even better is seeing many of you have your biggest months trading in November!

Seeing members refine their edge, elevate their confidence, and mature as traders has been the best part of this entire journey. The community we’ve built here is something special.

We have big plans for 2026 and want to make sure you can learn and grow with us!

Now is the perfect time to secure your spot and grow with us.

author: Jdub
content:
My biggest trade of the year

I want to take a moment to talk about what the Accelerator really means to me.

When I started this, I didn’t know exactly what it would turn into. I just knew I wanted to build a place where real trading happens. No hindsight, no hiding, no cherry picking. Just live trading, real execution, real wins, real losses, and real growth.

This was the first time I was going to live trade in front of so many people on a consistent basis and I put a lot of pressure on myself to perform and to continuously trade well day in and day out as many traders were watching every step along the way. 

After almost 2 years of live trading and showing up LIVE every single day through premarket prep, live trading, and weekly trade reviews. I can honestly say this has been my best trading year ever. Not just in P&L, but in execution, discipline, and psychology. And even better, I’ve watched so many of you transform as traders right alongside me.

The growth of this community has been unreal. The Accelerator is what it is today because of you. This is easily one of the strongest, most real trading communities in the industry and we’re only getting started.

With that being said we're going to do something special for the next 24 Hours.

Stay tuned. @everyone
